The '''Tarin system''' was a remote [[Star system/Legends|star system]] first charted by the [[Scout/Legends|scout]] [[Krin Koda]] during the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] era. It had five [[Planet/Legends|planets]] orbiting its hot [[Star/Legends|sun]], [[Tarin]]. Only the fourth, [[Koda's World]], supported life. However, the other four had abundant mineral resources, and would have been worth commercial exploitation.
